facebook.caption: POV: you're craving something light after four days of seafood and grilled meat. You take a wrong turn on Đường Nguyễn Trãi. You find Khánh Ly Vegetarian Restaurant. Under $10 a head. 405 reviews. Every dish plant-based, every plate proof that Phu Quoc isn't just about the ocean catch. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Plates landing fast at Khánh Ly Vegetarian Restaurant. All of this under $10. Phu Quoc doesn't get talked about for vegan food, but maybe it should. 405 reviews say yes.
